name: Spheria Emerging Companies Limited
analysis: SEC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 14% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.4300, stop A$2.2366, target A$2.6771 (1.28:1) — then trail it.
